headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $140
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $150 to $140.
